name: coding_iface_contract
description: Two-module pipeline identical to coding_iface BUT with an explicit shared interface contract in both leaf prompts AND contract-enforcing leaf oracles. Leaf tests now assert the exact key name 'value' (not key-agnostic). Hypothesis: with the contract enforced at the leaf level, composition_gap should drop toward 0 and ARM B should be able to solve. Keep coding_iface (the contract-weak one) intact for A/B comparison.
